title: Optimized Create
description: A simple Create modpack including all the necessary optimization mods.
body:
# Optimized Create

This modpack is just create with all the essentials optimization mods.

It also includes JEI, Jade, a minimap mod and an inventory sorter mod for extra quality of life.

Since 1.1.0 it include Terralith and Tectonic for enhanced world generation.
